name: 10_Face_Recognition_FaceNet_LFW_DL
query: Nisaidie kuunda mradi wa utambuzi wa uso wa PyTorch ukitumia mfano wa FaceNet na seti ya data ya LFW. Pakia seti ya data katika `src/model.py`. Pata mfano kutoka Hugging Face (unaweza kuupata kwenye https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet) na uuhifadhi katika `models/saved_models/`. Hakikisha data imeandaliwa ili kuhakikisha usanifishaji wa picha za uso katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia embeddings za uso katika `src/model.py` ili kuboresha utendaji wa mfumo wako. Chapisha usahihi wa utambuzi na uuhifadhi katika `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`. Kisha, onyesha matokeo ya embedding na uyahifadhi kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`. Mfano unapaswa kupakia bila matatizo, ikiwezekana na utunzaji wa makosa ikiwa kuna tatizo. Mionyesho inapaswa kufanya iwe rahisi kuona jinsi embeddings zinavyowakilisha vipengele tofauti vya uso.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LFW" (Labeled Faces in the Wild) inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "FaceNet" katika "PyTorch" unatumika, ukipakiwa kutoka [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet). Hifadhi mfano katika models/saved_models/.
Usahihi wa utambuzi unachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`.
Matokeo ya embedding yanaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa kupakia mfano unapaswa kuwa laini, na utunzaji wazi wa masuala yoyote ikiwa mfano utashindwa kupakia.
Mionyesho ya embeddings inapaswa kuwa wazi na kuonyesha kwa ufanisi vipengele tofauti vya uso.

hint: The page https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet provides guidance on how to use FaceNet; however, Hugging Face does not currently offer a model entry for direct use.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LFW" (Labeled Faces in the Wild) inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the LFW dataset. The implementation is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — a placeholder only. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no actual LFW data loading logic (no use of `sklearn.datasets.fetch_lfw_people`, `torchvision.datasets.LFWPeople`, file path reading, or any real dataset API). The `KEYWORDS = ["LFW"]` and `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list merely reference the requirement textually without implementing it. No real LFW data loading occurs.

judge_stats.criteria: Ulinganifu wa data na usanifishaji wa picha za uso unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual data alignment and standardization of facial images. The `build_transforms()` function only returns a placeholder list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` without any real implementation using libraries like `torchvision.transforms` or similar. There is no actual code for face alignment (e.g., using facial landmarks), image resizing, normalization of pixel values, or any other genuine preprocessing pipeline. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation" and "placeholder," confirming that the requirement has not been genuinely fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "FaceNet" katika "PyTorch" unatumika, ukipakiwa kutoka [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet). Hifadhi mfano katika models/saved_models/.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code in `src/model.py` is merely a placeholder stub that does not implement or load a FaceNet model from Hugging Face (`huggingface.co/py-feat/facenet`). The `build_model()` function only returns a string "model placeholder" and contains no actual model loading logic (e.g., no `from_pretrained`, no `torch.hub.load`, no download from Hugging Face). Additionally, there is no `models/saved_models/` directory in the project structure, and no saved model file (e.g., `facenet.pt`) is present. The requirement to use a FaceNet model in PyTorch loaded from Hugging Face and saved to `models/saved_models/` is clearly not fulfilled.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of facial embeddings. It only contains a placeholder `build_model()` function that returns a string, a list `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` that mentions embeddings as a text string, and no actual code for computing or using facial embeddings (e.g., no FaceNet model, no embedding extraction logic, no distance calculations, no real neural network operations). The file is explicitly described as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it is a stub, not a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Usahihi wa utambuzi unachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual recognition accuracy metrics. This indicates that real face recognition accuracy was never computed or saved — the file was created with dummy/placeholder content rather than genuine model evaluation results. Therefore, the requirement that recognition accuracy be properly printed and saved is not fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya embedding yanaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/embedding_visualization.png` exists in the project structure, but its content cannot be verified as a valid embedding visualization image. The file reading attempt resulted in an error indicating a media type mismatch (`image/jpeg` vs `image/png`), meaning the image content could not be successfully read or validated. There is no confirmed evidence that the embedding visualization was properly generated and saved as a valid PNG image file.
